title: スプリンターズSの後に・次のカワイイ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Sprinters Stakes draws to a close...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Curren Chan's victory over Nishino Flower!
However, the fact that she didn't overwhelm her
in terms of cuteness dampens Curren Chan's
excitement a bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We return to town to find that Curren Chan's race
with Nishino Flower has gone viral, launching her
Umatter fame skyward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how worked up everyone is gives Curren
Chan a hint about what direction to go moving
forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set the Takamatsunomiya Kinen as Curren
Chan's next big goal and decide to run in the
Ocean Stakes as a warm-up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Nishino Flower's victory... Yet despite the
loss, Curren Chan seems happy. She tells me this
is proof that she can still become cuter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:

with Nishino Flower has gone viral, launching her
Umatter fame skyward.
